---
title: "AdaptiveStackedWidget"
format: html
---

## Overview

`AdaptiveStackedWidget` is a thin `QStackedWidget` subclass used in `DataViewerPropertiesWidget`
(Feature Controls). It overrides `sizeHint()` and `minimumSizeHint()` to match the **currently
visible** page instead of the default behavior (effectively the union / maximum of all pages),
so the properties panel does not reserve extra vertical space when a shorter editor is active.

**Sources:** `src/WhiskerToolbox/DataViewer_Widget/UI/AdaptiveStackedWidget.hpp|.cpp`
